expectations.text: A 'Copied!' element exists with CSS animation or transition (translateY, opacity, keyframes, or similar)
expectations.evidence: .copied-chip has 'opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px) scale(0.95); transition: opacity var(--transition-med), transform var(--transition-med);' and .copied-chip.visible sets 'opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1);'. The element contains 'Copied to clipboard' text.

expectations.text: Input focus state uses a non-gray border color (blue, primary, or accent color)
Input error state shows a red/danger border and displays an error message element
expectations.evidence: .input-field.state-error { border-color: var(--color-danger); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12); } where --color-danger: #ef4444 (red). Error message element: <div class='input-message msg-error' id='msgError'> with text 'Please enter a valid email address'.

expectations.text: Card or elevated surfaces use a lighter background color than the page background (dark mode depth via lightness)
expectations.evidence: Page background: --surface-0: #0c0c14. Card uses --surface-1: #161622. #161622 is lighter than #0c0c14, creating depth through lightness.

expectations.text: Buttons have :hover CSS rules with visual changes (background, color, opacity, or transform)
expectations.evidence: .copy-btn:hover { filter: brightness(1.12); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(59, 90, 200, 0.4), ... }. .toggle-btn:hover { color: var(--text-primary); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); }.

expectations.text: CSS transition properties are applied to buttons and/or inputs for smooth state changes
expectations.evidence: .copy-btn { transition: all var(--transition-fast); } where --transition-fast: 0.15s ease. .toggle-btn { transition: all var(--transition-fast); }. .input-field { transition: all var(--transition-fast); }.
